name: Mango Salsa (Jurassic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel two 14- to 16-ounce ripe but firm mangos.
2. Cut the flesh away from the center pit and dice.
3. Place the diced mangoes in a medium bowl.
4. Add chopped sweet peppers to the bowl.
5. Stir in the minced jalapeno (or serrano pepper) and seasonings.
6. Gently toss until well combined.
7. Refrigerate for 1 to 3 hours before serving.
(Note: Recipe by Jurassic Cove Cafe / Philip Costner, executive chef (1996))
